title: relay store: list_groups_for_user no LIMIT — OOM on GROUP_LIST
description: store::list_groups_for_user() (relay/src/store.rs:1036) issues SELECT with no LIMIT. The GROUP_LIST handler calls this for every authenticated client. A user in an unbounded number of groups (enforced only by group cap per group, not total groups per user) returns all rows. On a relay with many groups, this can return millions of rows per request, causing OOM in the relay process. Fix: add LIMIT N to the query and return a paginated response, or cap total groups-per-user at the registration point.
notes: Part of security review round 23 (epic nie-nvk2)
